description: kotlinx-coroutines-rx2 integrates Kotlin coroutines with RxJava 2 by providing builders and adapters for Observable, Flowable, Single, Maybe, Completable, and Scheduler interoperation. It lets JVM Kotlin applications await RxJava 2 sources, expose coroutine flows or jobs as Rx types, and convert between coroutine and RxJava 2 APIs.
